# concepts

**Instance Property**

An array of elements that describes the expected contents of the image.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor @preconcurrency var concepts: [ImagePlaygroundConcept] { get set }
```

## Specifying the source content

- **sourceImage**: An image to use as source input for generating the new image.

items.description: An image to use as source input for generating the new image.
